title: Product announcement email
response:
Subject: Notely now works offline — for everyone

Hi there,

Ever lost a great idea because you were on a plane, in the subway, or just stuck with spotty Wi-Fi? Not anymore.

Today we're launching Offline Mode in Notely. Write, edit, and organize your notes anywhere — no connection required. The moment you're back online, everything syncs automatically. No manual saving, no "unsaved changes" anxiety, no lost work.

Offline Mode works across both mobile and desktop, so your notes stay with you whether you're at your desk or on the move.

And here's the best part: it's available today for all users, including everyone on the free plan. No upgrade needed.

Just update to the latest version of Notely and start writing — Offline Mode is already on.

**[Try Offline Mode now →]**

Happy note-taking,
The Notely Team
scoreDetail: completeness: 9/10, tone: 8/10, structure: 9/10, length compliance: 9/10 — All three key points are clear and prominent, tone is warm with only mild stock phrasing ('best part'), structure has a strong subject and single bolded CTA, and length (138 words) sits comfortably in range.
